title.id: Fuel & LPG Transit Terminal, Labuhan Amuk, Bali
title.en: Fuel & LPG Transit Terminal, Labuhan Amuk, Bali

summary.id: Full EPC (detailed engineering, procurement, construction, start-up & commissioning) untuk hub strategis pasokan bahan bakar dan LPG di wilayah Bali, NTT, dan NTB.
summary.en: Full EPC (detailed engineering, procurement, construction, start-up & commissioning) for a strategic fuel and LPG supply hub serving the Bali, NTT, and NTB regions.

about.id: Konsorsium Duta Firza, Intimarindo Primacon, Citramuda Nusasarana, dan Benua Mekanika. Total nilai proyek IDR 43 Miliar + USD 10 Juta.
about.en: Consortium of Duta Firza, Intimarindo Primacon, Citramuda Nusasarana, and Benua Mekanika. Total contract value IDR 43 billion + USD 10 million.

scopeOfWork.id: Detailed engineering, procurement, construction, start-up & commissioning untuk terminal transit Fuel & LPG.
scopeOfWork.en: Detailed engineering, procurement, construction, start-up & commissioning for the Fuel & LPG transit terminal.

title.id: 1,000 MT LPG Storage Tank, Labuhan Amuk, Bali
title.en: 1,000 MT LPG Storage Tank, Labuhan Amuk, Bali

summary.id: Detailed engineering, procurement, dan construction tangki LPG 1,000 MT sesuai ASME Section VIII Div. 2 untuk hub pasokan Bali, NTT, dan NTB.
summary.en: Detailed engineering, procurement, and construction of a 1,000 MT LPG tank to ASME Section VIII Div. 2 for the Bali, NTT, and NTB supply hub.

about.id: Tangki ID 17,03 m dengan ketebalan dinding 46 mm, disangga 8 kolom Schedule 40 (24" × 12 m). Nilai proyek IDR 3 Miliar + USD 1,7 Juta. Mitra: Inti Duta.
about.en: Tank ID 17.03 m with 46 mm wall thickness, supported by 8 Schedule 40 columns (24" × 12 m). Contract value IDR 3 billion + USD 1.7 million. Partner: Inti Duta.

scopeOfWork.id: Detailed engineering, procurement, dan construction (EPC) tangki LPG.
scopeOfWork.en: Detailed engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) of the LPG storage tank.

title.id: Tank Farm & Tank Foundation, Gresik Terminal (Package 1)
title.en: Tank Farm & Tank Foundation, Gresik Terminal (Package 1)

summary.id: EPCC Package 1 untuk pembangunan tank farm Gresik: enam tangki vertikal 5.000 m³, dua tangki 1.000 m³, lengkap dengan fondasi, bund wall, dan sistem drainase.
summary.en: EPCC Package 1 for the Gresik tank farm: six 5,000 m³ vertical storage tanks, two 1,000 m³ tanks, plus tank foundations, bund walls, and drainage systems.

about.id: Konsorsium Duta Firza, Intimarindo Primacon, & Bangun Cipta Kontraktor. Nilai proyek IDR 57 Miliar.
about.en: Consortium of Duta Firza, Intimarindo Primacon, & Bangun Cipta Kontraktor. Contract value IDR 57 billion.

scopeOfWork.id: EPCC (engineering, procurement, construction, dan commissioning) untuk Package 1.
scopeOfWork.en: EPCC (engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning) for Package 1.

summary.id: Additional scope di Gresik Terminal: instalasi HDPE membrane, gravel filling, sub-base preparation, dan konstruksi external/intermediate bund walls.
summary.en: Additional scope at Gresik Terminal: HDPE membrane installation, gravel filling, sub-base preparation, and external/intermediate bund wall construction.

about.id: Lingkup tambahan infrastruktur sipil dan lingkungan untuk Gresik Terminal. Nilai proyek USD 5 Juta.
about.en: Additional civil and environmental infrastructure scope for the Gresik Terminal. Contract value USD 5 million.

scopeOfWork.id: Civil and environmental infrastructure: HDPE membrane, gravel filling, bund walls.
scopeOfWork.en: Civil and environmental infrastructure: HDPE membrane, gravel filling, bund walls.

title.id: Berthing Facility & Jetty Piping, Pulau Laut Oil Terminal
title.en: Berthing Facility & Jetty Piping, Pulau Laut Oil Terminal

summary.id: EPC marine facilities dan pipeline infrastructure: 1 loading platform, 2 breasting dolphins, 4 mooring dolphins, plus piping dari battery limit ke loading platform.
summary.en: EPC marine facilities and pipeline infrastructure: 1 loading platform, 2 breasting dolphins, 4 mooring dolphins, plus piping from battery limit to the loading platform.

about.id: Konsorsium Intimarindo Primacon & Duta Firza. Nilai proyek USD 15 Juta.
about.en: Consortium of Intimarindo Primacon & Duta Firza. Contract value USD 15 million.

scopeOfWork.id: EPC marine facilities: loading platform 15×30 m, breasting dolphins 9×10×2 m, mooring dolphins 7×7×2 m, dan jetty piping.
scopeOfWork.en: EPC marine facilities: loading platform 15×30 m, breasting dolphins 9×10×2 m, mooring dolphins 7×7×2 m, and jetty piping.

summary.en: Supply and installation of specialized flexible piping for condensate distribution at the Muara Bakah refinery, East Kalimantan.

about.id: Advanced pipeline distribution untuk fasilitas refinery dan condensate. Nilai proyek USD 25 Juta.
about.en: Advanced pipeline distribution for the refinery and condensate facilities. Contract value USD 25 million.

scopeOfWork.en: Advanced pipeline distribution: supply and installation of flexible condensate piping.
